response.overview: # Grave Series 16  An exploration of death that reveals retribution to the deceased commensurate with their deeds while alive. If a person was good, then their reward is good, and if a person committed evil, then their reward is also evil. In Grave Series 16, viewers can witness various cases where Tok Adi, a gravedigger played by veteran actor Nasir Bilal Khan, easily handles corpses whose faces are clean and smiling, and whose graves smell fragrant, as well as cases where the handling of corpses becomes difficult, the corpse's face turns dark, and punishment in the grave has already begun. Tok Adi, who is also considered a pillar of society among his village community, will resolve all matters concerning death. Although Tok Adi will face various ridicule and curses from those who dislike him, he remains steadfast in facing all trials and entrusted responsibilities in carrying out his work.
response.title: Tanah Kubur Siri 16
